speaker: speaker1
text: I have to go up to London for a couple of days next week . Would you like to come ?

speaker: speaker2
text: That would be nice . How are you getting there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , I prefer to go on the train , but I suppose you want me to take the car .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I much prefer to go by car , then we don't need to get to the station with our luggage and ...

speaker: speaker1
text: And I've got to drive . You know I'm not fond of that . I found it much more relaxing to sit in the train .

speaker: speaker1
text: But very much quicker . But I know we'll never agree on this subject . You prefer the car . I prefer the train .

speaker: speaker2
text: Now , have you ever thought of going by express bus ?
